description: You are a facility planner for a diplomatic mission drafting a preliminary floor plan for a new consular annex. Using the open building shell in Sweet Home 3D, partition the space to enforce physical security separation between a public waiting area and a secure staff back-office. Create at least 4 interior walls to divide the suite into Public and Secure Staff Zones, and add at least 3 doors for access. Furnish the Public Zone with at least 15 seats and a security screening desk. Construct at least 4 interview stations along the partition using 4 desks/counters and 8 chairs. The Secure Back-Office must include at least 4 desks, 4 office chairs, 6 storage units, and a break corner with at least 1 appliance. Define and label at least 4 distinct zones (e.g., 'Security', 'Public Waiting', 'Interview Booths', 'Secure Back-Office') and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 2 rooms. Save the completed floor plan.
